body:
This PR introduces
 - a general Latitude Longitude Grid with possibility of stretching in all directions (latitude_longitude_grid.jl)
 - possibility of precomputing the LatLon metrics and store them in the grid struct within the constructor
    (precompute_metrics = true/false)
 - a general Rectilinear Grid with an architecture field and possibility of stretching in all directions (rectilinear_grid.jl) 
    This grid will eventually substitute all instances of RegularRectilinearGrid and VerticallyStretchedRectilinearGrid
title: General Latitude Longitude grid with precomputed metrics
